scope: S3 #280 adds the 28 stream_read list GET rows covered by Twenty read streams and records the 28 single-record get-by-id GET rows as excluded out_of_scope because generic direct_read JSON output is an engine capability gap. S4/#281 and S5/#282 will later add the write rows in sequenced DAG edits, never simultaneously.

excluded.reason: single-record get-by-id requires a generic direct_read output_policy; the engine currently supports only github_contents_* policies (cmd/connectorgen/validate.go:102-105, internal/connectors/engine/direct_read.go:23-24). Deferred to a follow-up engine capability.
